creator: che@bein.link
text:
(In reply to Devin Teske from comment #5)
Dear Devin,

Thank you so much for explaining this to me! However, I guess, the bsdconfig stuff doesn't match bsdinstall a bit. This might be just me, but the internal issue with that persists. However, I'm about to upload the new patch fixing the issues you've kindly noted to me.
